(0) the lords of the several Dwadasamsas of each sign are (1)
Ganesa (गणेश), (2) Aswini Kumaras (अश्विनीकुमारी, (3) Yama (यम)
and (4) Ahi (अहिः) recurring in regular order. But this view is
not aecepted by all.

ओजे कलांशाः प्रमुखास्तदीशा विरिचिशौरीशदिवाकराम ।
युग्मे विलग्ने सति भास्कराद्या विलोमतः षोडश भागनाथाः ॥३६॥

verse_data.sanskrit_text:
ओजे कलांशाः प्रमुखास्तदीशा विरिचिशौरीशदिवाकराम ।
युग्मे विलग्ने सति भास्कराद्या विलोमतः षोडश भागनाथाः ॥३६॥

content_blocks.text:
Sloka 36. The Shodasamsas (षोडशांश) or rath
portions of a sign are important. Their lords in the
case of an odd sign are Brahma (मा), Vishnu (विष्णु),
Hara (हर) and Ravi (रवि) recurring in regular order.
When the Lagna is an even sign, the lords of the
Shodasamsas (बादशांश) are to be counted in the inverne
`order from Bhaskara (भास्कर) or Ravi (रवि)

verse_data.translation:
Sloka 36. The Shodasamsas (षोडशांश) or rath
portions of a sign are important. Their lords in the
case of an odd sign are Brahma (मा), Vishnu (विष्णु),
Hara (हर) and Ravi (रवि) recurring in regular order.
When the Lagna is an even sign, the lords of the
Shodasamsas (बादशांश) are to be counted in the inverne
`order from Bhaskara (भास्कर) or Ravi (रवि)

content_blocks.text:
The Shodasamsas (षोधशांश) are thus described in the following
works-

फलीपिका-
स्वादीशाञ्च कलांशपा विधिहरीशार्काः समर्थोऽन्यथा ॥
सर्वार्थचिन्तामणिः
ओजे कलामामधिपास्तदीशाञ्चतुर्मुखो विष्णुहरी दिनेशः ।
युग्मे क्रमाम्यत्ययमेव राश। ... ... ...

verse_data.sanskrit_text:
फलीपिका-
स्वादीशाञ्च कलांशपा विधिहरीशार्काः समर्थोऽन्यथा ॥
सर्वार्थचिन्तामणिः
ओजे कलामामधिपास्तदीशाञ्चतुर्मुखो विष्णुहरी दिनेशः ।
युग्मे क्रमाम्यत्ययमेव राश। ... ... ...

content_blocks.text:
The Shodasamsa (षोडशांश) division of the zodiacal sign is
variously known as Kalamsa (कलांश), Nripamsa (नृपांश), and so on.
By this mode of division, the ecliptic is cut up into-192 eqtial
segments of 1° 52' 30" each in length. The segments are named
in regular consecution, in the order of the zodiacal signs, so that
the initial segment of the sign Aries takes on the name of that
sign, that of the sign Taurus assumes the name of Leo, and so
forth. The segment rulers are, in the case of the positive sigas
Brahma (मक्षा), Vishnu (विष्णु), Rudra (रुद्र) and Aditya (आदित्य) in
rotation. In the case of the negative signs, the enumeration of
rulership is reversed. /. Parasara (पराशर)

and (4) Ahi (अहिः) recurring in regular order. But this view is
not aecepted by all.

युग्मे विलग्ने सति भास्कराद्या विलोमतः षोडश भागनाथाः ॥३६॥

The Shodasamsa (षोडशांश) division of the zodiacal sign is
variously known as Kalamsa (कलांश), Nripamsa (नृपांश), and so on.
By this mode of division, the ecliptic is cut up into-192 eqtial
segments of 1° 52' 30" each in length. The segments are named
in regular consecution, in the order of the zodiacal signs, so that
the initial segment of the sign Aries takes on the name of that
sign, that of the sign Taurus assumes the name of Leo, and so
forth. The segment rulers are, in the case of the positive sigas
Brahma (मक्षा), Vishnu (विष्णु), Rudra (रुद्र) and Aditya (आदित्य) in
rotation. In the case of the negative signs, the enumeration of
rulership is reversed. /. Parasara (पराशर)
